deep_dive.title: Beyond the Frontier: Stochastic Backtracking for Efficient Test-Time Scaling
deep_dive.abstract: Test-time scaling improves language model reasoning by spending additional compute to explore multiple solution trajectories. The key challenge is to maximize accuracy while minimizing the total number of generated tokens during reasoning. Recent PRM-guided methods score intermediate prefixes to steer this search, but most are frontier-only: they keep only the current active prefixes and irreversibly prune or resample away the rest using noisy PRM scores. This can cause premature commitment, diversity collapse, and the loss of prefixes that still admit correct continuations. We introduce stochastic backtracking over a persistent pool of historical prefixes, allowing test-time compute to revisit previously generated states instead of only expanding the current frontier. To make this efficient, we propose two complementary mechanisms. Subpool Selection strengthens greedy PRM-guided search by applying Top-N selection within random subpools, giving historical prefixes a chance to bypass over-scored frontier candidates. Power Backtrack Sequential Monte Carlo extends SMC-style resampling to the persistent pool using powered PRM scores and mixture-corrected weights. Across mathematical reasoning benchmarks and model scales, our methods consistently achieve higher accuracy per token count, and the same level of accuracy using only a fraction of the token count in comparison to strong PRM-guided baselines, demonstrating that persistent-pool stochastic backtracking provides a simple and effective way to improve the accuracy-token trade-off in test-time scaling.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: test-time scaling for language model reasoning
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于语言模型推理的测试时扩展
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于语言模型推理的测试时扩展
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于语言模型推理的测试时扩展
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes stochastic backtracking for test-time scaling, allowing LM to revisit past prefixes and improve accuracy with less compute.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对测试时扩展中前沿方法只能保留当前前缀导致过早承诺和多样性丧失的问题，提出了一种随机回溯机制，通过维护历史前缀池允许回溯之前的状态。实验表明该方法在保持准确率的同时显著减少了生成令牌数，提升了推理效率。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对测试时扩展中前沿方法只能保留当前前缀导致过早承诺和多样性丧失的问题，提出了一种随机回溯机制，通过维护历史前缀池允许回溯之前的状态。实验表明该方法在保持准确率的同时显著减少了生成令牌数，提升了推理效率。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Test-time adaptation techniques and theories for machine learning models

deep_dive.title: Efficient Test-Time Finetuning of LLMs via Convex Reconstruction and Gradient Caching
deep_dive.abstract: Test-time finetuning (TTFT) is a rapidly evolving paradigm that adapts a language model to each prompt by retrieving related sequences, updating the model on them, and then evaluating the prompt. However, TTFT is only practical if it is fast: selection and finetuning both happen per query, making each a direct bottleneck. Existing methods trade speed for quality: fast retrieval is often redundant, while stronger diversity-aware selection adds prohibitive per-query cost. We introduce HullFT, a geometric approach to TTFT that addresses both bottlenecks. Given a query, HullFT first represents the query embedding as a sparse convex combination of few training sequences, using efficient projection-free Frank-Wolfe optimization. This yields a support set that is inherently relevant and diverse. We then convert the fractional convex weights into an exact integer multiset for finetuning through a geometric integerization procedure. The resulting multiplicities naturally create repeated examples, which we exploit with Gradient Reuse to amortize forward-backward computation across repeated finetuning steps. Our experiments show that HullFT improves the quality-efficiency tradeoff over current state-of-the-art TTFT methods, achieving lower bits-per-byte at substantially lower total runtime.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Test-time finetuning of LLMs via convex reconstruction and gradient caching
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过凸重建和梯度缓存实现大语言模型的测试时微调
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过凸重建和梯度缓存实现大语言模型的测试时微调
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过凸重建和梯度缓存实现大语言模型的测试时微调
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: HullFT adapts LLMs per query by representing query embedding as sparse convex combination of training sequences using Frank-Wolfe optimization, achieving efficient test-time finetuning.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对测试时微调速度慢的问题，提出HullFT方法。通过将查询嵌入表示为训练序列的稀疏凸组合，并利用投影自由的Frank-Wolfe优化和梯度缓存，实现了高效的大语言模型测试时微调。实验表明，该方法在保持性能的同时显著降低了每查询的微调时间，为实时自适应提供了可行方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对测试时微调速度慢的问题，提出HullFT方法。通过将查询嵌入表示为训练序列的稀疏凸组合，并利用投影自由的Frank-Wolfe优化和梯度缓存，实现了高效的大语言模型测试时微调。实验表明，该方法在保持性能的同时显著降低了每查询的微调时间，为实时自适应提供了可行方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Test-time adaptation techniques and theories for machine learning models

quick_skim.title: TIMEGATE: Sustainable Time-Boxed Promotion Gates for Continual ML Adaptation Under Resource Constraints
quick_skim.abstract: As machine learning(ML) systems evolve to continual adaptation, each re-training cycle uses compute, annotation, and energy. We introduce TIMEGATE, a policy layer managing adaptation by budgeting time, labeling, training, and evaluation. TIMEGATE emits a metric-availability signal M for partial vs. full-evaluation decisions. We validate: (i) labeling outperforms training by 2.3x on Adult tabular; (ii) it transfers to LLaMA-3.1-8B + QLoRA on SST-2 (accuracy 0.80 to 0.96; M =1 in 35/36 runs); (iii) M is informative, 28-cell sensitivity shows M drops to 0.81 at tight thresholds; (iv) 100-cycle simulation achieves 66% evaluation-compute savings with no silent mis-promotions; (v) 10%-slice evaluation on LLaMA uses 89% less wall-clock and energy on a single H200 (ratios agree to 0.2%).
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Online adaptation policy for continual ML, manages test-time evaluation decisions with metric-availability signal
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 持续机器学习的在线自适应策略，通过度量可用性信号管理测试时评估决策
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 持续机器学习的在线自适应策略，通过度量可用性信号管理测试时评估决策
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 持续机器学习的在线自适应策略，通过度量可用性信号管理测试时评估决策
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: TIMEGATE introduces a policy layer for continual ML adaptation under resource constraints, managing test-time evaluation decisions with a metric-availability signal, validated on tabular and LLM data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对持续机器学习资源限制问题，提出TIMEGATE策略层，通过时间盒管理自适应并发出度量可用性信号指导测试时评估。在Adult表格数据和LLaMA模型上验证，标签更新效果优于训练更新2.3倍，评估计算节省66%。该方法在资源受限场景下实现了可持续的自适应。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对持续机器学习资源限制问题，提出TIMEGATE策略层，通过时间盒管理自适应并发出度量可用性信号指导测试时评估。在Adult表格数据和LLaMA模型上验证，标签更新效果优于训练更新2.3倍，评估计算节省66%。该方法在资源受限场景下实现了可持续的自适应。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Online test-time adaptation for streaming data
